name: io.github.kensaurus/mushi-mushi
title: Mushi Mushi
description: Bug translation for vibe coders: plain-English diagnosis + paste-ready fix in your AI coding agent

environmentVariables.name: MUSHI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Project ingest/admin API key minted in the Mushi console (Settings → API Keys). Scope mcp:read for triage, mcp:write to dispatch fixes.

environmentVariables.name: MUSHI_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Project UUID the key belongs to. Optional for single-project account keys.

environmentVariables.name: MUSHI_API_ENDPOINT
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (self-hosted deployments). Defaults to the hosted Mushi Cloud endpoint.

environmentVariables.name: MUSHI_FEATURES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated feature groups to expose (triage,fixes,inventory,setup,docs). Defaults to the lean catalog; use 'all' for the full tool set.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <MUSHI_API_KEY> — a project API key with the mcp:read (and optionally mcp:write) scope.
